title: VerseCraft
description: VerseCraft expands vanilla Minecraft with new decorative blocks, plants, food, and small details — all designed to fit seamlessly into the original game style.
body:
# VerseCraft
**VerseCraft** extends Minecraft capabilities by adding new blocks and features that fit the vanilla style.

![new blocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e79c1787c7d407528e34ce078d62bfdec169edae.png)

## 🪵 Wooden Expansion

### Mosaics
VerseCraft introduces a new Mosaic block family for nearly every wood type, perfect for detailed floors, walls, and ceilings.
* Available for: Oak, Birch, Spruce, Jungle, Acacia, Dark Oak, Mangrove, Cherry, Pale Oak, Crimson, and Warped stems.
* Includes: Blocks, Stairs, and Slabs.

### 🌳 Azalea Wood Set
A complete wood family for the Azalea tree.
* Includes: Logs, Planks, Stairs, Slabs, Fences, Gates, and more.

## 🧱 Stone Expansion

### Dripstone Family
A full decorative expansion for Dripstone blocks.
* Base Blocks: Dripstone, Polished Dripstone.
* Bricks: Dripstone Bricks, Cracked Dripstone Bricks.
* Decor: Chiseled Dripstone, Chiseled Bricks.
* Variants: Full Stairs, Slabs, and Walls support.

### Calcite Family
Calcite becomes a full building material.
* Base Blocks: Polished Calcite.
* Bricks: Calcite Bricks, Cracked Calcite Bricks.
* Decor: Chiseled Calcite, Chiseled Bricks.
* Variants: Full Stairs, Slabs, and Walls support.

### Granite, Andesite & Diorite
The classic stones now have the same variety:
* Bricks: Regular & Cracked Bricks.
* Decor: Chiseled variants.
* Walls: Added Polished Wall variants.
* Variants: Full Stairs, Slabs, and Walls support.

## 🌿 Nature & World Gen

### Mushroom Fields Update
The Mushroom Island biome has been updated with new glowing vegetation!
* Mycelium Grass: Added Short and Tall variants.
* Pop Flower: A bio-luminescent flower that glows in the dark.
* Glowing Mushrooms: New fungi that emit light (Level 6) and glow in the dark.

### Ancient Plants (Sniffer Loot)
The Sniffer can now unearth two new ancient seeds:
* Blue Rose
* Iceflower

## 🏺 Archaeology & Sherds
Explore the world to find new ancient pottery sherds hidden in structures:
* 🐉 Dragon Sherd: Found in Stronghold chests.
* 👁 Eye Sherd: Found in Stronghold chests.
* 🥚 Egg Sherd: Found in Trail Ruins.
* ⚔️ Sword Sherd: Found in Trail Ruins.
* 🪓 Pillager Sherd: Found in Outposts & Woodland Mansions.
* 🔮 Portal Sherd: Found in Ruined Portals.

## ✨ Additional Features

### Decoration
* Copper Jack-o'Lantern: A new spooky lamp crafted with a Copper Torch.
* Soul Jack-o'Lantern: A blue variant crafted with a Soul Torch.

### Food
* Cherries: A new food item that drops from Cherry Leaves.
